failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items, despite the tool returning two available RGB mechanical keyboards priced above $233.90.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had relevant tool output at index 3 showing count=2 with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both greater than 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion: no items match. This directly contradicts the tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
